center.name: Johann Reinhold Forster
center.summary: Johann Reinhold Forster是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括灰船鸭、小藍企鵝、Forster's tern等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The genus name Sterna is derived from Old English "stearn", "tern", and forsteri commemorates the naturalist Johann Reinhold Forster. It breeds inland in North America in the northern United States and southern Canada, and migrates south to winter in the southern United States, Mexico, the Caribbean, and northern Central America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: {{Speciesbox | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | image = Blue Penguin Kapiti.jpg | image_caption = Little penguin in Kapiti Island, New Zealand | genus = Eudyptula | parent_authority = Bonaparte, 1856 | species = minor | authority = (Forster, 1781) | range_map = Map-of-distribution-of-Eudyptula-penguins-Blue-and-red-colours-indicate.png | range_map_caption = Eudyptula minor is found in blue and dashed areas, and Eudyptula novaehollandiae in red areas.{{Cite web |title=Fig 1

birds.evidence: The flightless steamer-duck (Tachyeres pteneres), Magellanic flightless steamer-duck, or Fuegian steamer duck, is a flightless duck native to South America

birds.evidence: thumb|Melanocorypha yeltoniensis The black lark (Melanocorypha yeltoniensis) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in south-eastern Russia and Kazakhstan
